zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore Percy於1326年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，她的父親Henry Percy27歲，母親Idonea de Clifford26歲。她於1344年與John FitzWalter在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年10月18日享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianore Percy于1326年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，她的父亲Henry Percy27岁，母亲Idonea de Clifford26岁。她于1344年与John FitzWalter在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年10月18日享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore Percy was born in 1326, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, Henry Percy, was 27 and her mother, Idonea de Clifford, was 26. She married John FitzWalter in 1344, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 October 1361, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore Percy est née en 1326, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Clifford, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John FitzWalter en 1344, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1361, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore Percy 1326 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Percy 27 und ihre Mutter Idonea de Clifford 26. Sie hat 1344 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom John FitzWalter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1361 im Alter von 35 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Percy è nata il nel 1326 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Henry Percy, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Idonea de Clifford, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John FitzWalter nel 1344, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 ottobre 1361, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore Percyが1326年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Percyは27歳，母Idonea de Cliffordは26歳であった。1344年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでJohn FitzWalterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年10月18日に35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore Percy(이)가 1326년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Percy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea de Clifford(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 John FitzWalter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 10월 18일 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Percy nasceu em 1326, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Clifford, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John FitzWalter em 1344, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1361, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore Percy родилась в 1326 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Percy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Clifford, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John FitzWalter в 1344 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 октября 1361 г. в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore Percy nació en 1326, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Idonea de Clifford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John FitzWalter en 1344, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1361, a la edad de 35 años.
